content: The battery life on this laptop is incredible. I got 12 hours of continuous use during a conference without needing a charger.
Screen flickers randomly when brightness is below 30%. Very annoying during nighttime use. Returning it tomorrow.
Keyboard feels premium with great key travel. The backlit keys are perfect for working in dim environments.
Setup was straightforward but the pre-installed antivirus keeps popping up with upgrade notifications. Bloatware issue.
This thing is fast. Compiles my React projects in seconds. The 32GB RAM handles multiple Docker containers without breaking a sweat.
The trackpad is unresponsive in the top-left corner. I've tried recalibrating but the issue persists.
Fan noise is unacceptable. Even with just a browser open, I can hear it whirring. Not suitable for quiet offices.
Lightweight and portable. Fits perfectly in my backpack. The build quality feels solid despite the thin profile.
Camera quality for video calls is decent but not great. Colours look washed out compared to my external webcam.
USB-C charging is a game changer. I can use the same charger for my laptop, phone, and tablet. One less thing to carry.
Speakers are surprisingly good for a laptop this thin. Clear mids and decent bass for casual music listening.
The hinge feels loose after just 3 months of use. Screen wobbles when typing on a desk. Disappointing build quality.
Perfect for students. Handles note-taking, web research, and light coding without any issues. Great value for the price.
Wifi keeps disconnecting from my home network. My other devices work fine so it's definitely this laptop's issue.
Display colours are vibrant and the 1440p resolution makes text incredibly sharp. Best screen I've seen on a laptop.
Rendering 4K video in Premiere Pro is smooth. The dedicated GPU handles timeline scrubbing without any lag.
It's way too heavy to carry around all day. Fine for a desk but not great if you commute on public transit.
The colour calibration out of the box is excellent. Finally a laptop display I can trust for photo editing work.
Gets extremely hot during extended gaming sessions. Had to buy a cooling pad. Should come with better thermal management.
Storage expansion was easy with the second NVMe slot. Upgraded from 512GB to 2TB in about 10 minutes.
